name: Narayanan Sivaji
text: Hospital has professional front desk staff. English should be a must to attract international patients. Had my dialysis twice in your hospital. On the whole your hospital was clean and  hygienic. Your auxiliary staff were humble and … More

name: Kiran Jadhav
text: Medicover Hospital is a Blessing to the residents of Aurangabad. It’s the only hospital to boast Tata Hospital trained Onco-Surgeons. My father is operated by Dr Nitin Tathe, the Best Surgeon I have experienced so far, knowing and adopting American/European surgical Onco-protocols, he performed almost bloodless oral Surgery though performed hemi Mandibulectomy was so swift from outside no deficit is seen at all. Nursing care is also ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️. I highly recommend Medicover Hospital!
